title: Comparing Your Real Options for Selling Online Without Gumroad — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: You're a digital creator based in Nigeria, Ghana, or Pakistan, and you're tired of seeing your sales blocked by PayPal's restrictions. You want to sell your ebooks, courses, and other digital products online without the hassle of Gumroad or the limitations of Stripe. But what are your real options for selling online without these platforms? Let's cut through the noise and explore the truth about each choice.
What Each Option Actually Offers

Gumroad offers a simple way to sell digital products, but it's not available in many countries due to PayPal's restrictions. Stripe is a popular payment processor, but it requires a business bank account and can be slow to set up. PayPal itself is also limited in many countries, and its fees can be high. Meanwhile, NOWPayments is a cryptocurrency payment processor that allows you to accept over 300 coins without KYC or buyer account requirements. It's a game-changer for creators in restricted countries who want to sell their digital products fast and without hassle.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

Gumroad and Stripe both have geographic restrictions that can block sales in certain countries. PayPal's restrictions are notoriously strict, and it's often the reason why creators can't sell their digital products online. NOWPayments, on the other hand, is a cryptocurrency payment processor that allows you to accept payments in over 300 coins, making it the perfect solution for creators in restricted countries. With NOWPayments, you can sell your digital products without worrying about country-specific restrictions.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

Gumroad's fees are relatively high, and it can take several days for payments to be processed. Stripe's fees are also high, and it requires a business bank account to set up. PayPal's fees can be high, and it's often the reason why creators can't sell their digital products online. NOWPayments, on the other hand, is a cryptocurrency payment processor that allows you to accept payments in over 300 coins without fees. With NOWPayments, you can get paid fast and without hassle.
Gumroad and PayPal are not your only options for selling digital products online – NOWPayments is the game-changing solution you need.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

Gumroad and Stripe both offer some automation features, but they can be slow to set up and require a lot of technical expertise. PayPal's automation features are also limited, and it's often the reason why creators can't sell their digital products online. NOWPayments, on the other hand, is a cryptocurrency payment processor that allows you to automate your sales and deliveries with ease. With NOWPayments, you can set up automated delivery and payment processing, making it the perfect solution for creators who want to sell their digital products fast and without hassle.

If you're a creator in a restricted country who wants to sell their digital products online without hassle, NOWPayments is the clear choice. With its cryptocurrency payment processor, you can accept over 300 coins without KYC or buyer account requirements. It's the perfect solution for creators who want to get paid fast and without hassle. How do I sell digital products if PayPal is not available in my country?

The direct answer is NOWPayments combined with the Core Shop Engine. NOWPayments is a crypto payment processor that requires no KYC from merchants and no account creation from buyers. It supports over 300 coins and sends a webhook to your backend when a payment confirms on-chain. The Core Shop Engine receives that webhook, verifies the transaction, generates a receipt, and delivers the product automatically. The key difference between this and a platform workaround is that it is not a workaround — it is a different infrastructure layer entirely. There is no platform that can suspend your access, no compliance team that can flag your account, and no payout schedule that delays your revenue. Your funds go directly to a wallet you control the moment a transaction confirms.
